summary: Patient Data Encryption and Audit Trails Test Case
description: Test case to validate that patient data is encrypted using AES-256 and audit trails are stored for every database change.
objective: Validate that system encrypts patient data using AES-256 and stores audit trails as per requirements.
prerequisites: System must be configured with AES-256 encryption
Database must be set up to store audit trails

test_steps.description: Enter patient data into the system
Inspect the stored patient data to verify it is encrypted with AES-256

expected_result: Data is encrypted with AES-256 and audit trails are stored for every database change.
acceptance_criteria: System encrypts patient data using AES-256
Audit trails are stored for every database change
